top_signals.reason: Boeing holds two NASA contracts totaling over $32.9B, both over $1B threshold triggering +15pts each, with cross-reference confirming 33 corruption indicators and social mentions on both awards adding +25pts. Combined signals across duplicate contracts apply the 1.3x multiplier yielding a high-confidence institutional accumulation signal.

Howard Lutnick confirmed ICIJ Paradise Papers match at 100% triggering +30pts offshore bonus, but no corroborating congressional trade or contract signal exists to cross-reference. Insufficient additional signals to warrant actionable position without further confirmation.

Bechtel holds a $17.2B DOE contract exceeding the $1B threshold for +15pts but is privately held with no ticker, zero social mentions, and no corruption indicators in cross-reference. Limited actionable trading signal.

Trump Jr posting Iran geopolitical content referencing WSJ opinion piece could signal oil price movement awareness, but no confirmed trade or cross-reference indicator supports actionable entry. Signal is speculative with no contract or legislative confirmation.

Rex Tillerson confirmed offshore papers match at 100% adds +30pts base, but he holds no current cabinet or congressional role reducing signal utility. No cross-referencing contract, trade, or legislative signal available to elevate confidence.

Boozman purchased two Treasury bond ETFs (IEF and IEI) on the same date, suggesting a deliberate rate or risk-off positioning signal. Multiple same-direction trades apply the 1.3x multiplier on base congressional score.
Paired Treasury ETF purchase alongside IEF on the same date amplifies conviction via multiple-signal multiplier. Coordinated bond ladder positioning by a Senate member.
Senate sale of eToro near IPO window warrants attention at meaningful size. Congressional trade signal only; no cross-reference or contract booster applies.
Small congressional purchase of a regional bank with no additional signal amplifiers. Low conviction standalone trade.
Congressional purchase of JPMorgan at minimal size with no corroborating signals. Routine large-cap financial buy.
Senate purchase of PepsiCo is a defensive consumer staples position with no supporting intelligence signals. Low signal strength.
Sale of S&P 500 Growth ETF is a risk-reduction move but small size limits signal weight. No cross-reference amplifier available.
Congressional purchase of Eaton Corp, an industrial and power management firm, with no contract or dark pool corroboration. Minimal signal strength.
Elevated dark pool volume of 173,349 shares across 6,450 trades in Hyatt is notable but lacks a congressional, contract, or geopolitical signal to amplify. Monitor for follow-on catalysts.
Modest dark pool activity in Bruker with no supporting signals from contracts, congressional trades, or cross-reference data. Insufficient evidence for a directional call.

Memorial Day is a special day in our family. All three of my brothers served—and I’m forever grateful they made it home safely.

To the service members who do not, we owe a debt that cannot be repaid.
The President should be lowering costs, not trading stocks.

Trump sued his own IRS.

Settled with his own government.

Secured a $1.8 billion slush fund to siphon toward his allies.

Blocked the IRS audits against himself and his family. 

This is corruption i

We did what we came here to do—and
